project_cognition.command: project-cognition.exe lexicon --intent implement --query='T011 desktop provider import preview commit dialog store actions i18n' --mode catalog --format json
project_cognition.summary: Blocked by missing .specify/project-cognition/project-cognition.db while status.json exists; continued with authoritative feature artifacts and live code evidence.

generalSettings.command: cd desktop && bun run test -- generalSettings
generalSettings.summary: 1 test file passed; 47 tests passed. Existing React act(...) warnings from GeneralSettings were emitted.

providerStore.command: cd desktop && bun run test -- providerStore

debug_leftovers_check.summary: No debug leftovers or forbidden secret-export UI markers found; activeId occurrences are existing provider-list/default-state reads, not import payload transfer.

must_preserve_evidence.CA_002_MP_008_G_PREVIEW_COMMIT: Settings import dialog parses pasted JSON and calls previewProviderImport({ bundle }) from Preview import; commitProviderImport is only called from Import selected after preview and selected resolutions exist.
must_preserve_evidence.CA_004_MP_006_G_CONFLICT: Preview candidates render default resolution text from server preview; conflict candidates offer rename/overwrite/skip, with rename preserved as the displayed default when supplied by preview.
must_preserve_evidence.CA_003_MP_007_G_NO_ACTIVE: Desktop commit sends only bundle plus candidate resolutions; no active/default provider fields are added. Store commit refreshes providers after success and does not call activateProvider or activateOfficial.
must_preserve_evidence.diagnostics_no_raw_secret: Diagnostics are rendered from server messages and additionally passed through a defensive sanitizer that redacts any credential.apiKey values present in the pasted bundle before display.
must_preserve_evidence.G_TEST: T010 Settings tests now pass, providerStore tests pass, and desktop TypeScript no-emit lint passes.

concerns: Project cognition remains unavailable because project-cognition.db is missing; no cognition state was modified.
generalSettings passes but emits pre-existing React act(...) warnings from unrelated GeneralSettings cases.
recovery_hints: If a future full gate fails on provider import backend availability, verify T009 server routes exist for /api/providers/import/preview and /api/providers/import/commit.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
